title: × Serapicamptis correvonii
taxonomy: × Serapicamptis correvonii is a rare orchid species, specifically classified as a hybrid between Serapias and Campanula. It is a member of the family Orchidaceae, which includes approximately 30,000 species of orchids worldwide. The genus Serapicamptis is a hybrid genus, combining characteristics of both Serapias and Campanula. × Serapicamptis correvonii is further classified as a member of the subgenus Serapicamptis and the tribe Orchideae. This classification is based on the orchid's unique morphology and genetic characteristics.
